posts.author: Cellblock-D (Marty Bartram)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to change the default boldness/transparency on Gantt charts so the future tasks are brighter than the past tasks.

What are you trying to achieve

Currently the events to the right of “today” are faded. They should be bold because it is more important to see them than the past events. Color customization should include a transparency setting.
